phrases.intent_en: Ask where to enroll in courses
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo matricularme en los cursos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh mah-tree-koo-LAR-meh en los KOOR-sos?

likely_response.local: En la oficina de admisiones, al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah DEH ahd-mee-see-OH-nehs AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: At the admissions office, in the back.

responses.english: At the admissions office, in the back.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah DEH ahd-mee-see-OH-nehs AHL FOHN-doh
responses.french: En la oficina de admisiones, al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the intensive program office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la oficina de programas intensivos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh es-TAH la o-FEE-see-na deh pro-GRAH-mahs in-ten-SEE-vohs?

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde consigo información sobre el alojamiento?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-deh kon-SEE-goh een-for-mah-SYOHN so-bre el ah-lo-hah-MYEHN-toh?

likely_response.local: En recepción, primera puerta a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN reh-thehp-thee-ÓN pree-MEH-rah poo-EHR-tah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: In the housing department, on the left.

responses.english: In the housing department, on the left.
responses.phonetic: EHN reh-thehp-thee-ÓN pree-MEH-rah poo-EHR-tah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: En recepción, primera puerta a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where cultural activities are posted
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el tablón de actividades culturales?
phrases.pronunciation: BWAY-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-day eh-STAH el tah-BLOHN day ahk-tee-vee-DAH-dehs kool-too-RAH-les?

likely_response.local: En el pasillo central, frente a usted.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL pah-SEEL-loh thehnt-RAHL FREHN-teh AH oo-STEHD
likely_response.translation_en: In the central hallway, opposite you.

responses.english: In the central hallway, opposite you.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL pah-SEEL-loh thehnt-RAHL FREHN-teh AH oo-STEHD
responses.french: En el pasillo central, frente a usted.
